subcodes.first_line: Say: O Concourse of Creation! By God, the Lord of Names hath come with a Cause against which all the hosts of earth combined shall prove powerless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا ملاء الانشاء تالله قد اتی مالک الاسماء بامر لاتقوم معه جنود الارض کلها و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @unity of thought and belief
